name: track
description: Use focused track CLI skills to create, search, read, and maintain linked Markdown notes in a configured track vault.

interface.shortDescription: Create, search, and maintain track notes
interface.longDescription: Use focused track CLI skills for note creation, note search/read workflows, and vault maintenance such as rename, doctor, and reindex.
defaultPrompt: Use $track-create-note to create a linked note in my vault.
Use $track-project-intake to record this bug/TODO in my project's note.
Use $track to rename a note and update backlinks.
